prompt: Create a single cute digital pet game sprite of Mofumaro, shown from behind as a fluffy cream-white round creature sitting down. The character is centered on a dark charcoal transparent-looking game background, with a soft glow along the lower edge. It has a large pear-shaped, marshmallow-like body covered in long shaggy fur, subtle pale yellow shading, spiky tufts of fur sticking up on the top of the head, and exactly 2 small rounded bear-like ears visible at the upper left and upper right. No face is visible because the creature is facing away. At the bottom, show exactly 2 small hind paws facing the viewer, one on the left and one on the right, each with pink paw pads: each paw has 1 larger oval central pad and 3 small toe pads. Keep the pose simple and symmetrical, like an idle/action asset for a web pet-raising game. Use soft pastel coloring, adorable mascot proportions, clean silhouette, gentle lighting, and no text, no accessories, no extra characters, no front-facing facial features.
